transformation: Unicode NFC normalization and surrounding/repeated whitespace cleanup only.
rationale: Prevents formatting artifacts without changing words or language.
null_policy: Blank stays blank.

transformation: Blank source product category mapped to __unknown__; source_category_missing_flag set to 1.
rationale: Maintains foreign-key integrity without inventing a category.
null_policy: No imputation.

transformation: Use source translation when present; otherwise retain Portuguese source label and mark translation status.
rationale: Avoids guessed translations.
null_policy: No blank output label; provenance flag retained.

transformation: Derive integer YYYYMMDD keys from source timestamps and build a continuous date dimension from global minimum to maximum.
rationale: Supports star-schema time analysis and every source timestamp, including outliers.
null_policy: Source timestamp nulls remain null.

transformation: Set quantity=1 for every row.
rationale: Each source order_item_id row is one item occurrence; repeated units appear as separate sequence rows.
null_policy: Not applicable.

transformation: line_merchandise_value=unit_price; line_total_value=unit_price+freight_value.
rationale: Transparent additive item measures.
null_policy: No imputation.

transformation: Count item rows/products/sellers and sum merchandise/freight by order.
rationale: Creates safe order-grain metrics without duplicating item values.
null_policy: Orders with no item rows receive zero aggregates plus has_items_flag=0.

transformation: Choose the highest-value payment row; lower payment_sequential breaks ties.
rationale: Deterministic single payment label for mixed-payment orders.
null_policy: Null when no payment row exists.

transformation: Average all review scores; latest score uses latest answer timestamp; expose review_count.
rationale: Preserves multiple-review reality instead of dropping rows.
null_policy: Null scores when no review exists.

transformation: Compute durations with source timestamps; late means actual delivery after estimate.
rationale: Supports logistics analysis with explicit semantics.
null_policy: Null when required timestamp is absent.

transformation: Flag carrier-before-purchase or customer-delivery-before-carrier.
rationale: Preserves and identifies source chronology anomalies.
null_policy: No timestamp is rewritten.

transformation: payment_value minus item merchandise-plus-freight; reconciled when absolute difference <=0.02.
rationale: Makes financial discrepancies visible without balancing adjustments.
null_policy: Null when either side is absent.

transformation: Window orders by purchase timestamp within customer_unique_id.
rationale: Enables repeat-customer analysis while retaining every source customer_id row.
null_policy: No imputation.

transformation: Aggregate source item/order activity by seller.
rationale: Provides a seller dimension with auditable metrics.
null_policy: Zero only when the empty-set aggregate is structurally valid.

transformation: Use location from the most recent order, with customer_id as deterministic tie-breaker.
rationale: Creates one model-ready row per stable shopper.
null_policy: Favorite category/payment may remain null if source child rows are absent.

transformation: Join only on validated foreign keys and retain exactly one output row per order item.
rationale: Provides a BI/ML-friendly file while preserving line-item grain.
null_policy: Order-level columns repeat and are explicitly prefixed.

transformation: Map the 27 source state codes to IBGE federation-unit codes and five macroregions.
rationale: Creates the regions dimension required by Nexus BI.
null_policy: All observed state codes resolve.

transformation: Do not statistically impute any genuine source null.
rationale: Avoids hallucinated values and preserves real operational sparsity.
null_policy: Every missing output is counted in missingness_report.csv.

transformation: Retain every source geolocation observation, add a source-row surrogate key, and flag coordinates outside latitude -35 to 6 / longitude -75 to -32.
rationale: Preserves evidence while making obvious coordinate anomalies machine-readable.
null_policy: No coordinate is deleted or corrected.

transformation: Aggregate by postal prefix plus state; choose representative city by frequency and compute all-observation and in-envelope coordinate means.
rationale: Provides a safe non-duplicating geospatial join surface while retaining the full source file separately.
null_policy: In-envelope means are null when a group has no in-envelope observation.
